message:
fix(runtime): blocking worker must drain queue before checking shutdown

Workers in blocking_worker_loop() fell through to the shutdown check
after completing a task instead of looping back to drain remaining
queued work. This caused premature worker exit during shutdown when
tasks were still pending in the SegQueue.

Add `continue` after signal_done() to ensure workers check for more
queued tasks before evaluating shutdown/park/retire conditions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
